_source: GET https://<domain>/.well-known/did.json (public DID document for a did:web account). Real STRUCTURE of an atproto DID document, trimmed to the fields the resolver reads. The companion did-plc-doc.json covers the did:plc path (resolved via plc.directory); this covers the did:web path (resolved via the domain's well-known doc). serviceEndpoint is the account's real PDS host family (host.bsky.network).
